speaker: speaker1
text: Hello ! Tomorrow I'm going to need a wake-up call .

speaker: speaker2
text: Not a problem . What time shall we call you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I always hit the snooze button , so give me two calls , one at 7 and another at 7 fifteen .

speaker: speaker2
text: It'll be our pleasure . We'll call you at 7 and then at 7 fifteen .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oops , cancel that . Change the second call to 7 thirty will you , please ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No sooner said than done . Can I help you with anything else ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , that's about it for now . Thanks .

speaker: speaker2
text: Okay , sir . Have a pleasant evening .
